title: PAUL MILLER'S LAW
summary: Newtown Township, PA - Starting tomorrow, June 05, 2026, Paul Miller’s Law will be in full effect and enforceable with fines. This law prohibits, as a primary offense, any driver from using an interactive mobile device (IMB) while driving a motor vehicle.  Follow the link...
